topics.title: Auto Show Experiences and Car Logistics
topics.summary: The studio discusses various anecdotes from a recent auto show, including the difficulties of navigating crowded vehicles, the logistics of ordering specific car parts, and humorous interactions with fans.

topics.title: Tommy Chong's Legal Battle Over Bong Sales
topics.summary: The show details Tommy Chong's imprisonment for shipping bongs across state lines and his subsequent defense of the practice during sentencing.

topics.title: Drug Policy and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on the costs of the war on drugs, an anecdote about Tommy Chong’s arrest for bongs, and a review of a book featuring salsa dancing.

topics.title: Sour Shoes Family Dynamics and Musical Career
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding Sour Shoes' personal life, his relationship with his parents, his musical background at St. John's, and a brief phone call with his father.

topics.title: Radio Industry Dynamics and Corporate Rivalries
topics.summary: The studio discusses the complexities of satellite radio success, upcoming film festival preparations, and the professional tensions surrounding corporate decisions at CBS.

topics.title: Transition from Terrestrial to Satellite Radio
topics.summary: The show explores the shift from terrestrial to satellite radio, discussing the success of the transition and the perceived advantages of satellite platforms over traditional broadcasting.

topics.title: Iran Oil Prices and Global Warming
topics.summary: The studio discusses the geopolitical implications of Iranian oil reserves, the transition to hydrogen fuel, and reports on melting ice caps affecting polar bear populations.

topics.title: Unpaid Debt and Hostile Exchange
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange regarding an unpaid $1,500 debt involving a music producer and concludes with a repetitive audio loop.

topics.title: Joey Boots Sobriety Celebration
topics.summary: The show features a celebratory segment for Joey Boots following his completion of a rehabilitation program, including testimonials from supporters and medical professionals regarding his recovery.

topics.title: Phobias and Stunts
topics.summary: The studio discusses various phobias, including garden gnomes and ovens, while a guest performs stunts involving raw fish for money.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including a listener interaction regarding a medical emergency, a discussion on radio industry competition with CBS, and an interview with a man who lost his eye in a fireworks accident.

topics.title: Medical Consultation on Eye Socket Safety
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the medical risks and legal liabilities of a planned stunt involving an eye socket.

topics.title: Film Festival Logistics and Staff Disputes
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming film festival details including red carpet coverage, prize amounts, and internal tensions regarding staff participation.

topics.title: Host Confronts Sal Over Behavior and Alcohol
topics.summary: The studio experiences a tense atmosphere as the host confronts Sal regarding his erratic behavior, intoxicated state, and refusal to emerge from a bathroom during the broadcast.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Radio Industry Talk
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on the complexities of radio career longevity, celebrity legal disputes involving Charlie Sheen and Oprah Winfrey, and various entertainment news items including Hollywood stars' privacy in Namibia.

topics.title: Cuckolding and Internet Dating Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features a caller describing his experiences and motivations for engaging in cuckolding arrangements with men met through internet chat rooms.

topics.title: Current Events and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including personal anecdotes, reports on the Iraq War, oil prices, celebrity news regarding Paula Abdul, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
